name: Biscuit Mix (All Purpose Baking Mix)
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons unsalted butter, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, whisk together the dry ingredients.
2. Using an electric mixer on low or speed #2 of a three-speed mixer, gradually cut in the fats until the mixture is uniform and no longer visible fat particles remain.
3. Remove the mixture from the mixer.
4. Divide the mix into 3 separate airtight containers.
5. The recipe yields 3 batches of mix, with each batch being approximately 2 cups.
6. Store the mix refrigerated for up to one month.
7. This recipe can be easily doubled or tripled as needed.
8. It is guaranteed to produce the best biscuit mix you will ever use.
